rationale: The cited paper (10.1509/jmr.13.0050) is not an obvious incidental mention: it develops an individual-level multichannel model with carryover/spillover effects and conversion attribution, which overlaps directly with the citing paper’s multichannel advertising-response setting and spillover-focused constructs. Given this strong topical/methodological alignment and no evidence that it is merely a perfunctory background citation, this pair should be retained for full relation assessment.
